/CAL:RULING ON PC 1170,03 PETITION FOR RESENTENCE/X:DEFENDANT IS PRESENT TELEPHONICALLY VIA ZOOM FROM VALLEY STATE PRISON, CDCR #K98113/X:PEOPLE'S PETITION PURSUANT TO PC 1170(D) IS GRANTED,/CTORD:SENTENCE OF 05-22-98 VACATED/DEF:IS RESENTENCED AS FOLLOWS:/AJW/CH1:SP 18Y:U/667(D)(E)/ENH:CH1:TYPE667(A)(1)PC:TI5Y:CS/X:PC 12022,5(A) ENHANCEMENT APPENDED TO COUNT 1 IS STRICKEN,/X:COURT STRIKES ALL OTHER REMAINING ALLEGATIONS OF PRIOR CONVICTIONS WHICHWERE ALLEGED PURSUANT TO PC 667(A)(1) AND 667,5(B)/X:DEFENDANT ISSENTENCED ON COUNT 2 TO 4 YEARS, THE UPPER TERM,/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCEDTO COUNT 3 TO 7 YEARS, THE UPPER TERM,/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO COUNT4 TO 3 YEARS, THE UPPER TERM,/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO COUNT 5 TO 3 YEARS, THE UPPER TERM, TO RUN CONCURRENT TO COUNT 1,/X:ALL ENHANCEMENTS RELATED TO COUNTS 2,3,4 AND 5 ARE STRICKEN,/654:2,3,4/X:TOTAL 23 YEARS STATE PRISON/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IN AN AMOUNT TO BE CALCULATEDBY CDCR/X:PETITIONER SHALL WAIVE EXCESS CREDITS SOLELY FOR THE PURPOSE OFALLOWING A TWO YEAR PAROLE PERIOD AND FOR NO OTHER PURPOSE,/X:ANY EXCESSCREDITS MAY BE USED TO SATISFY ANY OTHER OUTSTANDING SENTENCE, THE SENTENCEPRONOUNCED TODAY SHALL RUN CONCURRENT WITH ANY  OTHER SENTENCE INCLUDING DEL NORTE CASE NUMBER 99214,/ /DNACOMP/X:FINES AND FEES REMAIN AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED,/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE AS DIRECTEDBY CDCR/X:IT IS THE COURT'S RECOMMENDATION THAT THE DEFENDANT BE PAROLEDTO  CONTRA COSTA COUNTY TO FACILITATE RESIDENCY IN CONCORD WITH HIS DAUGHTER,/
